name: Vault to blog

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 🐛 Fixes
- Fixed react app directory name issue.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
##  ✨ New Features
- Added a **Home tab** in the left sidebar so users can quickly return to the root page.
- Added **draggable sidebar resizing** for better control of reading/navigation space.
- Added **keyword search in the sidebar tree** to find notes faster.
- Added **tag-query search and tag-click integration** to improve tag-based discovery.
- Added support for a **configurable `index.md` homepage**.
- Added **indexable SEO output** for generated pages to improve search visibility.
## 🔧 Improvements
- Expanded UI foundations with new **tab/sidebar rendering components**, **TOC header components**, and **SVG/Lucide icon integration**.
- Improved markdown processing by initializing and extracting a **TOC structure** during app startup.
- Improved file traversal internals via **Dirent-based traversal** for cleaner/faster file utility behavior.
- Updated README feature documentation to reflect current capabilities.
## 🐛 Fixes
- Fixed **sidebar body-content search** regression.
- Fixed **reference link rendering** issues.
- Fixed **tag chip rendering** when `types.json` metadata is missing.
- Fixed a **callout indicator parsing** edge case in pre-build processing.
- Fixed a staging issue for copied `data.json` files.
- Fixed a theme display issue in the React app.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
First release of VTB.

## Supported Features
- Obsidian-style Layout
  - Left Sidebar
    - Files explorer only
- Markdown View
  - Basic Markdown support
  - Internal Links
    - Block references are not supported
    - Heading references are not supported
    - Display names are supported
  - External Links
    - Escaped characters are not supported
    - Display names are supported
  - Callouts
  - Properties
    - Aliases are not supported
  - Embedded Images
    - Display names are supported
    - Width adjustments are supported
  - Footnotes
    - Inline footnotes are not supported
    - Links in footnotes are not supported
  - Math
    - Math blocks are supported
    - Inline math expressions are supported

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/barkstone2/vault-to-blog/commits/0.0.1
